title: payments-api CI failure with ambiguous timeout / upstream error
summary: tests/test_payments.py::test_create_payment_success failed in CI with a TimeoutError after 30s, alongside an upstream ConnectionError warning. The evidence does not point to a specific code path or single root cause, so the incident is escalated to human review rather than assigned a confident diagnosis.

evidence.summary: Request timed out; error surfaced from the HTTP transport layer, not application code.
evidence.snippet: E   TimeoutError: request timed out after 30s

evidence.summary: Upstream service reported unavailable around the same time.

blocked_reasons: Insufficient evidence to identify a single root cause.
Confidence (0.40) is below the threshold required for an automated diagnosis.
No stack frame or log line grounds the failure to a specific file or line in the repository.
GitHub issue creation is blocked: a confident, grounded root cause is required first.

log_finding.summary: test_create_payment_success failed with a 30s TimeoutError raised in the HTTP transport layer; an upstream ConnectionError warning appeared just before. No application stack frame is present, so the failing code path cannot be grounded.

evidence.summary: Request timed out; error surfaced from the HTTP transport layer, not application code.
evidence.snippet: E   TimeoutError: request timed out after 30s

evidence.summary: Upstream service reported unavailable around the same time.

blocked_reasons: No application stack frame; failing code path cannot be grounded.
log_finding.stack_trace_summary: TimeoutError raised in httpx transport (handle_request); no application code frame appears in the traceback.

root_cause.summary: Insufficient evidence to identify a single root cause. The failure is consistent with several possibilities (upstream outage, network timeout, or a slow/misconfigured dependency), but the logs do not contain enough information to choose one with confidence. No specific file or line can be implicated.

evidence.summary: Request timed out; error surfaced from the HTTP transport layer, not application code.
evidence.snippet: E   TimeoutError: request timed out after 30s

evidence.summary: Upstream service reported unavailable around the same time.

blocked_reasons: Insufficient evidence to select a single root cause.
alternatives: Possible cause (unconfirmed): upstream payment-gateway outage or degradation.
Possible cause (unconfirmed): network/transport timeout unrelated to application code.
Possible cause (unconfirmed): a slow or misconfigured dependency exceeding the 30s timeout.

safety_review.summary: No secrets detected. The diagnosis is low-confidence and not grounded to any code location, so no fix is proposed. Safe to display as an inconclusive report; a GitHub issue requires explicit human approval after manual investigation.
blocked_reasons: Confidence below threshold; root cause undetermined.
safety_review.required_human_action: Manually investigate the timeout/upstream failure (check gateway status and retry the CI run); there is insufficient evidence for an automated root cause or fix.
